cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Mean Value Theorem: the value $c$ guaranteed to exist on $(a, b)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: MVT conditions: $f$ must satisfy these two conditions on $[a, b]$
cards.answer: f \text{ continuous on } [a,b] \text{ and differentiable on } (a,b)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Extreme Value Theorem: conclusion guaranteed when $f$ is continuous on $[a, b]$
cards.answer: f \text{ attains an absolute maximum and absolute minimum on } [a,b]

cards.prompt: Condition for a critical point at $x = c$

cards.prompt: Test for a function increasing on an interval

cards.prompt: Test for a function decreasing on an interval

cards.prompt: Test for concave down on an interval

cards.prompt: Second Derivative Test for a local minimum at $x = c$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Second Derivative Test for a local maximum at $x = c$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Candidates Test: to find absolute extrema on $[a, b]$, evaluate $f$ at these points
cards.answer: f(a),\ f(b),\ \text{and } f(c) \text{ for each critical point } c \in (a,b)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Rolle's Theorem: if $f$ is continuous on $[a,b]$, differentiable on $(a,b)$, and $f(a) = f(b)$, then...

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Condition for an inflection point at $x = c$
cards.answer: f''(x) \text{ changes sign at } x = c

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: First Derivative Test: $f$ has a local max at $c$ when $f'$ changes from...

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: First Derivative Test: $f$ has a local min at $c$ when $f'$ changes from...

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Average rate of change formula over $[a, b]$ (equals MVT slope at $c$)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Second Derivative Test: if $f''(c) = 0$, the test is...

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Optimization: confirm a critical point is an absolute maximum on an open interval using the Second Derivative Test

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: L'Hôpital's Rule: when a limit has $\frac{0}{0}$ or $\frac{\infty}{\infty}$ form

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: L'Hôpital's Rule: the two indeterminate forms that directly qualify

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Linearization (local linear approximation) of $f$ near $x = a$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Newton's Method iteration formula for approximating a root of $f$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The theorem that guarantees a point in $(a, b)$ where the instantaneous rate of change equals the average rate of change over $[a, b]$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The theorem guaranteeing that a continuous function on a closed interval $[a, b]$ must attain both an absolute maximum and an absolute minimum

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A point $x = c$ in the domain of $f$ where $f'(c) = 0$ or $f'(c)$ is undefined — a necessary (but not sufficient) condition for a local extremum

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A point where the function changes from concave up to concave down, or vice versa — $f''$ changes sign here

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The description of a curve where $f'' > 0$; the tangent line lies below the curve

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The description of a curve where $f'' < 0$; the tangent line lies above the curve

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The test that uses the sign change of $f'$ around a critical point to classify it as a local maximum, local minimum, or neither

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The test using $f'(c) = 0$ and the sign of $f''(c)$ to classify a critical point as a local max or min; inconclusive when $f''(c) = 0$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The method of finding absolute extrema on a closed interval by comparing function values at all critical points and endpoints

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The process of using derivatives to find the maximum or minimum value of a quantity, typically subject to a constraint

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The rule used to evaluate limits of indeterminate forms $\frac{0}{0}$ or $\frac{\infty}{\infty}$ by differentiating numerator and denominator separately

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The tangent-line approximation $L(x) = f(a) + f'(a)(x-a)$ used to estimate function values near $x = a$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: An iterative root-finding algorithm given by $x_{n+1} = x_n - \frac{f(x_n)}{f'(x_n)}$, which uses tangent lines to successive approximate a zero of $f$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The highest value $f(c)$ such that $f(c) \geq f(x)$ for all $x$ in the domain or given interval

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A special case of the MVT where $f(a) = f(b)$, guaranteeing $f'(c) = 0$ for some $c \in (a,b)$
